profiles.title: Quiet Luxury
profiles.description: Muted palette, warm or neutral tones, refined and understated mood.

profiles.title: Modern Editorial
profiles.description: Balanced contrast and polished tones for premium social-ready edits.

profiles.title: Cinematic Editorial
profiles.description: Moody, high-contrast references for dramatic old-money visuals.

profiles.title: Heritage Soft
profiles.description: Lower-contrast references with classic textures and delicate finishing.

profiles.title: Statement Glam
profiles.description: Rich palette and elevated contrast for bolder premium edits.
